'''βàöl-th-z-w''' ('''kalathzewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenotransplant|xenotransplant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenotransplant|xenotransplant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöl-th-z-w
|-
! Lemma
| kalathzewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilathzewoko|thilathzewoko]] || [[word:jilathzewoko|jilathzewoko]] || [[word:shilathzewoko|shilathzewoko]] || [[word:kilathzewoko|kilathzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulathzewoko|thuthulathzewoko]] || [[word:jujulathzewoko|jujulathzewoko]] || [[word:shushulathzewoko|shushulathzewoko]] || [[word:kukulathzewoko|kukulathzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulathzewoko|thulathzewoko]] || [[word:julathzewoko|julathzewoko]] || [[word:shulathzewoko|shulathzewoko]] || [[word:kulathzewoko|kulathzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulathzewoko|thulathzewoko]] || [[word:julathzewoko|julathzewoko]] || [[word:shulathzewoko|shulathzewoko]] || [[word:kulathzewoko|kulathzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelathzewoko|thelathzewoko]] || [[word:jelathzewoko|jelathzewoko]] || [[word:shelathzewoko|shelathzewoko]] || [[word:kelathzewoko|kelathzewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholathzewoko|tholathzewoko]] || [[word:jolathzewoko|jolathzewoko]] || [[word:sholathzewoko|sholathzewoko]] || [[word:kolathzewoko|kolathzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholathzewoko|tholathzewoko]] || [[word:jolathzewoko|jolathzewoko]] || [[word:sholathzewoko|sholathzewoko]] || [[word:kolathzewoko|kolathzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠlathzewoko|thΟΠlathzewoko]] || [[word:jΟΠlathzewoko|jΟΠlathzewoko]] || [[word:shΟΠlathzewoko|shΟΠlathzewoko]] || [[word:kΟΠlathzewoko|kΟΠlathzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalathzewoko|thathalathzewoko]] || [[word:jajalathzewoko|jajalathzewoko]] || [[word:shashalathzewoko|shashalathzewoko]] || [[word:kakalathzewoko|kakalathzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalathzewoko|thalathzewoko]] || [[word:jalathzewoko|jalathzewoko]] || [[word:shalathzewoko|shalathzewoko]] || [[word:kalathzewoko|kalathzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalathzewoko|thalathzewoko]] || [[word:jalathzewoko|jalathzewoko]] || [[word:shalathzewoko|shalathzewoko]] || [[word:kalathzewoko|kalathzewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalathzewithi|shalathzewithi]] || [[word:shalathzewiji|shalathzewiji]] || [[word:shalathzewishi|shalathzewishi]] || [[word:shalathzewiki|shalathzewiki]]
